data.title: Warning: FBI cautions Tron users on fake FBI token scam, aiming to defraud by pretending to investigate users with prompts to verify assets.
data.description: Fraudsters are pretending to be representatives of the FBI using a token to deceive Tron users, claiming they are facing an investigation. They are instructing users to undergo a verification process to prevent their assets from being frozen. It is essential for Tron users to remain vigilant and not disclose any personal information or complete any checks prompted by these scammers. If you encounter any suspicious activity, report it immediately to the appropriate authorities. Stay cautious and protect your assets from falling into the hands of these fraudsters.
Kuwait Army states it is currently responding to hostile missile and drone activity.

data.title: Flowco Holdings Inc. Announces Pricing of Public Offering by Selling Stockholders
data.description: Houston-based Flowco Holdings Inc. has disclosed the pricing for an underwritten public offering by affiliated GEC Advisors LLC entities. The offering entails 7.8 million shares of Flowco's Class A common stock at $22.00 per share. Additionally, the Selling Stockholders have allowed underwriters a 30-day option to buy an extra 1.17 million shares at the same offering price.

data.title: AXT Inc Stock Is Trending On Thursday After Surging Over 19%: Here's Why
data.description: AXT Inc. (NASDAQ: AXTI) saw a 1.26% surge to $58.82 during after-hours trading, following a 19.13% gain in the regular session where the stock closed at $58.09. The company released its fourth-quarter and fiscal year 2025 financial results, showing a dip in Q4 revenue to $23.04 million from $28.0 million in the previous quarter due to limited export permits. Despite this, the gross margin under generally accepted accounting principles improved to 20.9% from 17.6% in Q4 2024. The net loss also decreased to $0.08 per share from $0.12 per share. CEO Morris Young expressed satisfaction at receiving some permits.

data.title: Elon Musk Appears As 'The Dogefather' While Petting A Shiba Inu In AI Video, Discusses DOGE's Wedding And Private Keys
data.description: Elon Musk, on Thursday, posted an AI-generated video where he appears as "The Dogefather" alongside a Shiba Inu dog. In the video, Elon parodies a famous scene from "The Godfather" while petting the dog and discussing Doge's wedding and private keys. The AI version of Musk jokes, "You don't even think to call me the Dogefather," echoing Al Pacino's line from the movie. Musk, known for his fondness for DOGE, first coined the term "Dogefather." For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Chiayi International Art Doc Film Festival 2026: A Global Intersection of Land Art and AI Ethics
data.description: On March 7th, 2026, the Chiayi International Art Doc Film Festival (CIADFF) commenced at the Chiayi City Museum of Art. The festival of the year featured artists from various countries including Switzerland, Poland, France, the Czech Republic, India, and the Sakha Republic. This event aims to promote international collaboration and creativity within the art documentation film industry.
